tactical_shape: Australia's central overload caused Paraguay problems in midfield
Julio Enciso carried the attack largely on his own, with limited support around him
standout_players: Julio Enciso 7/10 — carried the team forward on his own and caused more problems in the second half
Orlando Gill 6/10 — made a handful of crucial saves, especially early and late
Gustavo Gómez 6/10 — steady at the back and helped stifle Irankunda
Omar Alderete 5/10 — struggled against Volpato and later injured
fatigue_injuries: Omar Alderete suffered a knee injury just after the hour and never really recovered
home_read.momentum: Enciso offered Paraguay their main threat, but the team lacked support and struggled to control midfield, leaving them with a frustrating goalless draw.

tactical_shape: Used central midfield progression and line-breaking runs to break out of Paraguay's press
Back three with wing-backs/full-backs given licence, especially Jordy Bos on the right
standout_players: Jordy Bos 8/10 — most impressive game so far, given more licence to attack
Jackson Irvine 7/10 — midfield general, covered every blade of grass and helped Australia progress the ball
Cristian Volpato 7/10 — Australia's best player in the first hour, dangerous in pockets on the right
Alessandro Circati 7/10 — tidy on the right side of the back three and kept Enciso quiet
Harry Souttar 7/10 — anchored the back three with assurance and physicality
Aiden O’Neill 7/10 — confident, more present, combined well with Irvine
Patrick Beach 6/10 — calm and confident, including a stoppage-time save
Connor Metcalfe 6/10 — wider role limited his impact
Lucas Herrington 6/10 — calm but largely untested
Aziz Behich 6/10 — largely ineffective but composed
Nestory Irankunda 6/10 — marked out of the game and rarely got service
fatigue_injuries: Jacob Italiano was ruled out with an adductor injury
Mat Leckie suffered a hamstring strain against the USA
Jackson Irvine earned a silly yellow early in the second half
away_read.momentum: Australia look organised and resilient, with midfield control and a clean sheet point to a side that can adapt even with enforced changes.
